properties.name: box.security.enabled
properties.description: Whether API-oriented authentication is enabled. When false, all requests are permitted and the default Spring Security login page remains disabled.

properties.name: box.security.authenticate-all-paths
properties.description: Whether all non-excluded paths require authentication.

properties.name: box.security.permit-paths
properties.description: Paths that are always allowed without authentication.

properties.name: box.security.token-header
properties.description: Header name used to carry the JWT token.

properties.name: box.security.token-prefix
properties.description: Token prefix stripped before parsing the JWT.

properties.name: box.security.claims.user-id
properties.description: Claim key used for the user id.

properties.name: box.security.claims.user-name
properties.description: Claim key used for the user name.

properties.name: box.security.claims.tenant-id
properties.description: Claim key used for the tenant id.

properties.name: box.security.jwt.secret
properties.description: Shared secret used to verify HS256 JWT signatures.

properties.name: box.security.jwt.issuer
properties.description: Expected JWT issuer. Leave empty to skip issuer validation.

properties.name: box.security.jwt.refresh-enabled
properties.description: Whether refresh token support is enabled.

properties.name: box.security.jwt.clock-skew-seconds
properties.description: Allowed clock skew in seconds when validating exp and nbf claims.
